verse_text: And they asked him, 'What then? Are you Elijah?'

pericope.title: The Word Becomes Flesh to Reveal the Father

links.context: John does not ascribe to himself the role of Elijah ([[JOH.1:21]]), but Jesus does. John fulfilled the mission of Elijah ([[LUK.1:17]], [[LUK.1:76]]) and his destiny was similar. Yet John is honored over Elijah (v. 11) because John prepared the way for the advent of Christ Himself.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
